hero.tagline1: Coffee turned into code, code turned into product ☕→💻
hero.tagline2: I build fast and accessible interfaces with React, Node.js and TypeScript, from design to deploy.

items.title: Animated Background
items.description: Dynamic background generator using Google Gemini and n8n to transform descriptions into pure CSS code.

items.title: Pokédex
items.description: Pokémon explorer featuring real-time search, advanced filtering, and a modern, fully responsive interface.

items.title: CineAI
items.description: Smart assistant that recommends movies based on your mood, integrated with TMDB API and n8n workflows.

items.title: LoveCats
items.description: Team-developed cat adoption platform focused on connecting pets with their forever homes.

about.p1: A passionate <1>junior fullstack developer</1> dedicated to creating elegant interfaces and robust APIs. My journey began with the curiosity to understand how the web works.
about.p2: Specialized in <1>React</1> and <1>Node.js</1>, always seeking the perfect combination of design and performance. I believe good code is code that solves real problems.
about.p3: Currently focused on deepening knowledge in software architecture and DevOps practices. Available for freelance projects and full-time opportunities in <1>Florianópolis</1>.

timeline.title: Fullstack Developer Jr
timeline.description: Start of professional journey in web development

timeline.title: Fullstack Bootcamp
timeline.description: Intensive training in modern web development

timeline.title: First Projects
timeline.description: First contacts with programming and logic

contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or want to discuss opportunities? I'd love to hear from you!
contact.toast_description: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon!

chatbot.title: Virtual Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Hi! I'm the portfolio's virtual assistant. I was trained with their professional background to help you. How can I assist you today?
chatbot.reply_skills: Main skills include: React, TypeScript, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, Three.js, FastAPI, Vite, Jest/Vitest, n8n, Axios and React Router. Want to know more about any of them?
chatbot.reply_projects: You can check out the projects in the "Projects" section above! Scroll up or click "View Projects" in the menu.
chatbot.reply_location: Currently based in Brazil. Open to remote and on-site opportunities!
chatbot.reply_cv: CV download will be available soon! Meanwhile, explore the portfolio to learn about my work.
chatbot.reply_default: Thanks for your message! I can help with information about skills, projects, location or CV. What would you like to know?
